invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破134（基于ATR 1.1348和近期低点）或融资费率Z-Score升至10%以上（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 134 (based on ATR 1.1348 and recent lows) or funding rate Z-Score rises above 10% (indicating short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.132（基于ATR 0.0011和近期低点）或融资费率Z-Score降至50%以下（显示多头压力增加），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.132 (based on ATR 0.0011 and recent lows) or funding rate Z-Score falls below 50% (indicating increased long pressure).
